text_template: Support for the show today comes from Bombas If your sock drawer could use a little love you can upgrade to Bombas They have a range of well socks designed for every activity every activity Like their cushioned sweat sports socks They say you don need to worry about sliding down your foot while you stay active this spring They have more than socks too with breathable soft high basics underwear and t Our colleague Nisha Chital has tried Bombas One thing that's great is Bombas, they have warmer socks that are really thick and warm and great in the winter, and they're like the only sock I want to wear in the winter. And they also have lighter weight ones, like the no-show socks that are great for like sneakers, flats, loafers, warmer weather footwear. You can go to Bombas.com slash explain and use the code EXPLAINED for 20% off your first purchase. That's B-O-M-B-A-S dot com slash explained. The code at checkout is EXPLAINED.
